rationale: Both round-1 items fixed at 1fd29af9, verified against the shipped Bead-2 contract. Delta is surgical (2 sentences + runbook, no section touched beyond the two flagged lines); both mirror pairs byte-identical at 1fd29af9; nothing new lost or weakened. No new issues.
